properties.text: A very strong thunderstorm is moving almost North, it has scans up to 66 dBZ, hail of 6cm or higher is possible, winds up to 90km/h or more are also possible, please seek shelter if you are in the path of this storm!
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Within this very strong thunderstorm, there is radar indicated rotation. Meaning a tornado is possible. Please, seek shelter!
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
Im issuing a PDS severe thunderstorm warning. 
With an ongoing tornado warning, and 6cm+ hail was observed, i believe this is what suits this storm well.
Please, if you are in the path of this extremely strong thunderstorm, please seek shelter, due to the ongoing big hail and a tornado warning!
Strong wind gusts are also possible, maybe reaching even up to 100 km/h!
- Hail 6cm+
- Wind 100km/h+
- dBZ 64+
- Echo tops 16km+
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A couple of damagingly severe thunderstorms are moving east towards osnabruck, Germany, they can bring hail up to 4cm or more, wind gusts of 80km/h are expected, please take cover if these storms are coming for you!
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
